title: !INSERT INTO: number of values doesn't match number of colum
poc: create table test (a integer, b integer);
key_bug_features: Mismatch between values and columns in INSERT statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id integer PRIMARY KEY, name varchar(50), age integer CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test1 (id, age) VALUES (2, (SELECT MAX(age) FROM test1));
CREATE TABLE test2 (x integer, y integer DEFAULT 10, z varchar(100) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test2 (x, y) VALUES (3, NULL);
